response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with strong polyglot experience, solid systems exposure (DLang microservices handling millions of req/s, async I/O, low-latency work at Sociomantic), and GIS/geospatial background via GISCollective and Green Map work. However, the resume shows no modern C++ or Rust production experience — only brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments over a decade ago — which is the core technical requirement. Recent work is predominantly TypeScript/Node.js full-stack, not systems-level routing pipeline development.
strengths: Genuine geospatial/GIS experience building map data platforms (GISCollective, Green Map)
Low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools, OS/Linux fluency
concerns: No demonstrated modern C++ or Rust commercial experience (core requirement)
Recent 5+ years focused on TypeScript/Node web work, not systems/pipeline engineering
No navigation/routing-specific domain experience or tile-based pipeline background
